meaning: Every day at these six times: 12:00, 22:00, 23:00, 00:00, 01:00 and 02:00.
spanish: todos los días a las 12:00, 22:00, 23:00, 00:00, a la 01:00 y a las 02:00

meaning: At minute 1 and second 1 of each hour (HH:01:01).
spanish: en el minuto 1 y el segundo 1 de cada hora

meaning: Every hour from 09:00 through 20:00, and also at 22:00 (22:00 is a separate extra hour; 21:00 is excluded).
spanish: cada hora de las 09:00 a las 20:00 y también a las 22:00

meaning: In December only, at 23:59, on the 31st OR on any Friday (both December and 23:59 apply to both conditions; inclusive OR).
spanish: en diciembre, el 31 o los viernes, a las 23:59

meaning: On Mondays at 09:30, firing at second 5 and second 10 (09:30:05 and 09:30:10).
spanish: los lunes a las 09:30, en los segundos 5 y 10

meaning: Monday through Friday, at minute 30 of each hour from 09:00 to 17:30, every 15 seconds within that minute.
spanish: de lunes a viernes, en el minuto 30 de cada hora de las 09:00 a las 17:30, cada 15 segundos

meaning: Every minute from minute 0 through 30, but only during the hours 09:00, 17:00, 18:00 and 19:00.
spanish: del minuto 0 al 30 de las 09:00, 17:00, 18:00 y 19:00

meaning: Every minute from minute 0 through 30, within every second hour (every two hours).
spanish: cada minuto del 0 al 30 dentro de cada dos horas
